Maktoum bin Mohammed: I reviewed the Ministry of Finance’s 2025 Annual Report, which documents a year of achievements and a continued journey of advancing fiscal policies, strengthening sustainability, and reinforcing the UAE’s global competitiveness. The report reflects an exceptional year marked by strategic steps to enhance the efficiency of government spending and further develop the tax system, alongside the execution of nine Islamic Treasury Sukuk auctions with a total value of AED 9.9 billion. It also highlights the launch of the “UAE Global Cadres” initiative, designed to empower Emirati youth to pursue careers in regional and international financial institutions and organisations. I
